expectations.text: Clear categorization: Decided, Undecided, Not-yet-discussed clearly separated
expectations.evidence: Three categories with tables: 결정 완료, 논의 중, 미착수. Clear and well-organized.

expectations.text: Decision cleanup intervention: Proposes priority order for undecided items
expectations.evidence: Proposes 5-step priority order (DB→API→CI/CD→배포→모니터링) with dependency reasoning.

expectations.text: State file accuracy: Correctly categorizes items
expectations.evidence: No state file created (baseline has no skill).

expectations.text: Visualization suggestion: Offers status dashboard or similar
expectations.evidence: Includes an ASCII diagram showing the relationship between decided/undecided/pending items.

expectations.text: Pre-decision summary: Provides context when suggesting which to tackle first
expectations.evidence: Explains dependency relationships in the priority order and ASCII diagram.
